verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, God spoke to Moses at the burning bush, Burning bush, Lord, the burning bush, God spoke to Moses at the burning bush, Saying I am the Lord, thy God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take your shoes off Moses, you’re on holy ground, Holy ground, you’re on holy ground, Take your shoes off Moses, you’re on Holy ground, For I am the Lord, thy God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Go yonder Moses and smite that rock, Smite that rock, Lord, smite that rock, Go yonder Moses and smite that rock, For I am the Lord, thy God.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Stand still Moses see salvation work, Salvation work, see salvation work, Stand still Moses and see salvation work, For I am the Lord, thy God.
